design_philosophy: High-end voice assistant aesthetic (Arc, Raycast, Google Assistant). Dark, spacious, cinematic, with subtle grain, optical glassmorphism, and bold asymmetry.

typography.setup: Use next/font or Google Fonts in index.html for these fonts.

headings.usage: Headers, Orb status text, App Name 'Nova', Marketing/Teaching section titles. Use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Conversation history, terminal/code blocks, tool names, settings labels, architecture layer descriptions. Tracking normal.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12 for major containers). Mobile-first, responsive grids.

surface_strategy.glassmorphism: Optical Clarity. bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-2xl, border-white/10 inner stroke. Apply to floating navs, tool panels, and modal overlays.
surface_strategy.flat: For architecture bento boxes: solid bg-[#0A0A0A] with 1px border-white/5 and no shadow.

voice_orb.technical: Use Framer Motion. Combine radial gradients with animate props. Must be 60fps (animate only transform/opacity).

visuals.base: A central glowing circle with heavy backdrop-blur. mix-blend-screen for outer glows.

idle.animation: Slow breathing pulse. Scale core 0.95 -> 1.05 over 4s. Opacity of outer glow fades 0.4 -> 0.8.

listening.animation: Expanding ripple rings. 2-3 motion.div rings that scale 1 -> 2.5 and fade opacity to 0 over 1.5s continuously.

thinking.animation: Rotating arc + dot fade. Use a conic-gradient mask or SVG stroke-dasharray rotating 360deg over 2s. Inner dot pulses.

speaking.animation: Waveform bars. Render 3-5 vertical pills inside/around the orb that randomly scaleY(0.3 to 1.2) rapidly.

conversation_panel.layout: Google-Assistant style. Centralized or side-anchored depending on viewport.
conversation_panel.user_bubble: Align right. Glassmorphism border, subtle bg-white/5, rounded-2xl.
conversation_panel.ai_bubble: Align left. Solid dark muted bg, no border, rounded-2xl. Use JetBrains Mono for text.
conversation_panel.input_area: Optional text input anchored at bottom with a push-to-talk mic button. Mic button uses active orb color when listening.

architecture_teaching_page.layout: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Bento Grid.
layers: 1. Tauri/Electron Shell (col-span-1 md:col-span-full, visual top layer)
architecture_teaching_page.styling: Use grid layout with 'Grid Borders' (border-collapse style). Add subtle SVG dashed lines connecting the layers to show data flow.

mcp_tools_panel.layout: Sidebar or bottom sheet. Dense data layout.
mcp_tools_panel.styling: List items with glowing status dots (green = active/enabled, dim gray = mocked/disabled). JetBrains Mono for tool names.

system_tray_header.layout: Fixed top, full width, h-14, glassmorphism.
system_tray_header.elements: Left: 'Nova' in Bricolage Grotesque. Right: Connection indicator (pulsing 6px dot) and Settings toggle.

motion_and_interactions.general: Smooth state changes. Hover states MUST have higher contrast.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Provide text fallbacks for orb states.

assets_and_effects.cinematic_noise: MANDATORY: Add a global fixed overlay `div` with pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay, and opacity-20 containing an SVG feTurbulence fractalNoise filter. This kills the digital flatness and creates the premium 'Arc Browser' feel.
assets_and_effects.icons: Use lucide-react (default) with 1px or 1.5px stroke width for a sharp, technical look.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='mic-button', data-testid='orb-status', data-testid='chat-input'.
